description: HR manual evaluation ground truth for Day 17 ATS testing. Keys = 'resume_id::jd_id'.
instructions: 1. Run: python scripts/run_ats_testing.py --scaffold-hr  (to auto-create PENDING entries from your scores)
2. Edit each entry: set 'category' (tech|non_tech|fresher|senior) and 'hr_decision' (Shortlisted|Manual Review|Rejected)
4. Run: python scripts/generate_ats_report.py  (to build the final report)
